query:
-- Find by linked user account
SELECT acp.id, acp.userId, u.name, u.email, acp.personalEmail, acp.membershipTier, acp.teamId, acp.agentStatus
FROM agent_crm_profiles acp
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = acp.userId
WHERE u.email = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com' OR u.id = 9690367;

-- Also search by name in case userId is not linked
SELECT acp.id, acp.userId, acp.personalEmail, acp.membershipTier, acp.teamId, acp.agentStatus
FROM agent_crm_profiles acp
WHERE acp.personalEmail LIKE '%abusufyan%' OR acp.personalEmail LIKE '%azim%';
